subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! We cherish the desire to make mention of thee with a remembrance whereby the world is illumined, and We wish to give thee to drink of the water of life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احمد انا نحب ان نذکرک بذکر یستضییء به العالم و نرید ان نسقیک ماء الحیوان
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @knowledge; recognition of God, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation
